# Q1 2020 Digital Trust Index: The Fraud Landscape

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Read this report to learn about the latest trends in fraud, including:

*   Factors driving the 73% increase in payment fraud in 2019
*   The hottest month for payment fraud – and it’s not in the fall or winter
*   The payment type most commonly associated with fraud – and it’s not credit cards
*   Which industries were the biggest targets for fraud in 2019
*   And a wealth of other valuable data points and findings to keep your Trust and Safety team a step ahead of fraudsters

### Dive into data

See Report
